message:
chore(beads): polish asupersync migration beads (round 1)

Changes:
- Promote critical-path beads to P1 (3d14m, 2abzy, 1yz79, 1bznu)
- Flatten Phase 3 bottleneck (wa-5da3j closed, deps rewired directly)
- Split wa-1eso2 into native_events (wa-k0tk5) and tailer (wa-124z4)
- Add integration spike bead (wa-27vuf) for early API validation
- Make wa-181uk parallel with wa-2toy3 (not sequential)
- Narrow scope: wa-hj458 (just deps), wa-1bznu (no select!), wa-q8vj3 (primitives only)
- Add comprehensive unit test requirements to all module beads
- Add structured logging requirements to all test beads
- Add LabRuntime seed-locked testing to all acceptance criteria

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
